subcodes.first_line: O twin rays of the celestial orb of God's love! Sacrifice in His divine path your souls, your hearts, and your very being, and turn ye [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو شعاع کوکب محبت الله در سبیل الهی جان و جنان و وجود را انفاق کنید و رو
subcodes.subjects: @transcending the material condition, @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
